common.offline: You're offline — changes will sync when connectivity is restored.

classes.title: Your Classes
classes.description: The gentlest way to manage attendance. Simple, thoughtful, and unhurried.
classes.readyToStart: Ready to start? Create your first class or join an existing one to begin taking attendance.
classes.deleteDialogDescription: This will permanently delete {name} and all its data. This action cannot be undone.
classes.deleteError: Failed to delete class. Please try again.
classes.archiveDialogDescription: This will hide {name} from your dashboard. All data will be preserved and you can restore it later if needed.
classes.archiveError: Failed to archive class. Please try again.
classes.unarchiveDialogDescription: This will restore {name} to your active dashboard.
classes.unarchiveError: Failed to unarchive class. Please try again.
classes.noArchivedClassesDesc: Classes you archive will appear here. You can restore them anytime.
classes.joinDesc: Enter the 6-character class code provided by your instructor to join.
classes.joinError: Class code must be exactly 6 characters.
classes.joinFailed: Failed to join class. Please check the code and try again.
classes.createDesc: Create a thoughtful space for your students to learn and grow.
classes.classDescPlaceholder: Add a gentle note about this class...
classes.createFailed: Failed to create class. Please try again.
classes.createHint: After creating, you can set up custom attendance statuses, scoring rules, and invite students from the class settings.
classes.nameMin: Class name must be at least 2 characters
classes.nameMax: Class name must be less than 50 characters
classes.descMax: Description must be less than 100 characters
classes.visibleToStudents: This will be visible to all enrolled students.
classes.helpIdentify: Helps students identify the right class.

records.noFinalizedSessions: No finalized sessions found. Finalize an active session from the Overview tab to generate historical records in this matrix.
records.inactiveDesc: These students have been deactivated but their historical records are preserved.
records.exportFailed: Failed to export attendance records. Please try again.

members.cannotRemoveLastTeacher: Cannot remove the last teacher from the class
members.cannotChangeOwnRole: You cannot change your own role
members.removeConfirmDesc: This will remove them from the active class roster. Their historical attendance records will be preserved for archival purposes.
members.noMembers: No students enrolled yet. Share the class join code to get started.

landing.heroDesc:
The only attendance platform

that understands teaching. Focus on your students, not the paperwork.
landing.f1Desc: Don't waste time marking everyone 'Present'. We assume they are here—you only tap when they aren't.
landing.f2Desc: Collaborative marking for large lecture halls. See updates from co-teachers and TAs across devices instantly.
landing.f3Desc: Prevent proxy attendance with time-rotating, cryptographically secure QR codes. Students self-verify with ease.

auth.manageProfile: Manage your personal information and preferences.
auth.basicDetails: Your basic profile details visible to others in your classes.
auth.emailManaged: Email is managed by your authentication provider.
auth.cleaningSession: Cleaning up your session. Just a moment.
auth.signInDesc: Sign in to continue managing your classes with thoughtful efficiency.
auth.quote: The simplest way to manage your classroom presence.
auth.quoteDesc: Exception-based attendance tracking designed for educators who value time and clarity.
auth.googleError: Failed to sign in with Google.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage your application preferences and behavior.
settings.appearanceDesc: Customize how the application looks and feels.
settings.darkModeDesc: Toggle dark theme for the application.
settings.notificationsDesc: Control how and when you receive alerts.
settings.emailNotificationsDesc: Receive email updates about class changes.
settings.soundEffectsDesc: Play sounds for success and error actions.
settings.showProfileDesc: Allow other students to see your name and avatar.

errors.pageDrifted: The page you're looking for has drifted beyond the horizon. Let's guide you back to familiar grounds.
errors.classNotFoundDesc: This class doesn't exist or you don't have access to it.

footer.tagline: The only attendance platform designed for modern, human-centric classrooms.

checkin.invalidLinkDesc: This check-in link is missing required information. Please scan the QR code again or ask your teacher for a new link.
checkin.verifyCheckin: Please wait while we verify your check-in.
checkin.successDesc: You have been successfully checked in to this session. You may close this page.
checkin.invalidTokenDesc: This QR code is invalid. Please scan the current code displayed by your teacher.
checkin.expiredTokenDesc: This QR code has expired. Please ask your teacher to refresh it and scan again.
checkin.sessionNotActiveDesc: This session is not currently accepting check-ins.
checkin.sessionFinalizedDesc: This session has been finalized and cannot accept new check-ins.
checkin.alreadyCheckedInDesc: You have already checked in to this session.
checkin.sessionNotFoundDesc: The session you're trying to check in to could not be found.
checkin.classNotFoundDesc: The class for this session could not be found.
checkin.failedDesc: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again or contact your teacher.

sessions.finalizedDesc: This session has been finalized and is read-only.
sessions.readOnlyStudent: You are viewing this session in read-only mode. Only teachers and TAs can mark attendance.
sessions.scheduleDesc: Times are used for self-check-in rules and student records.
sessions.qrDesc: Students can scan this QR code to check in to the session.
sessions.qrNotActive: QR check-in is not active for this session.
sessions.finalizeConfirmDesc: This will lock the attendance records and calculate final statistics for this session. This action cannot be undone.

overview.deleteDesc: This will permanently remove this session and all associated attendance records. This action cannot be undone.
overview.noSessions: No attendance sessions recorded yet. Start your first session to begin tracking.
overview.archiveDialogDescription: This will hide {name} from your dashboard. All data will be preserved and you can restore it later if needed.
overview.archiveError: Failed to archive class. Please try again.

classSettings.classDetailsDesc: Update the name and description of this class.
classSettings.archiveDesc: Archiving a class will hide it from your dashboard but preserve all historical records and attendance data.
classSettings.deleteDesc: Deleting a class will permanently remove it and all its data. This action cannot be undone.
classSettings.deleteConfirmDesc: This will permanently delete the class and all its data including members, sessions, and attendance records. This action cannot be undone.
classSettings.archiveConfirmDesc: This will archive the class. You can restore it later if needed, but it will be hidden from your active dashboard.
classSettings.statusDefinitionsDesc: Define attendance statuses with custom colors, scoring multipliers, and absence weights.
classSettings.archiveStatusDesc: This status will be archived and hidden from new attendance records. Historical records using this status will be preserved.
classSettings.label: Label
classSettings.scoringRulesDesc: Configure how attendance affects student scores.
classSettings.capAtZeroDesc: Prevent score from dropping below zero.
classSettings.preventBelowZero: Prevent scores from going below zero
classSettings.cannotDeleteLast: Cannot delete the last active status
